name: Autumn Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 oz each) fat-free cream cheese
4 cups apples, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Prepare the sides of a 9-inch springform pan with cooking spray.
3. To prepare the crust, combine the cracker crumbs, 3 tablespoons of granulated sugar, 1 teaspoon of cinnamon, and melted margarine in a mixing bowl. Spread the mixture evenly around the prepared springform pan, pressing gently.
4. To prepare the filling, combine the cream cheese, 1/2 cup of granulated sugar, beaten egg whites, and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared crust.
6. To prepare the topping, combine the apples, remaining granulated sugar, and cinnamon in a mixing bowl. Spread evenly over the cheesecake layer.
7. Bake for approximately 60 minutes.
